title: Half-Life footsteps
description: Make your steps sound like in Half-Life!
body:
### Make your steps sound like in Half-Life!

Replaced all footsteps (except mobs that have own like zombies and etc.). Have fun with it!

Video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IQZQ8TeK76g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

All sounds used in this resource pack from Half-Life and Half-Life: Opposing Force.
